ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sec_filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that submitted the filing */,
  "filing_year" INTEGER /* Year the filing was submitted */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number assigned to the filing by the SEC */,
  "final_url" TEXT /* URL where the filing can be accessed */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date when the filing was submitted */,
  "filing_type" TEXT /* Type of SEC filing (e.g., 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K) */,
  "reporting_period" TEXT /* Reporting period for the filing (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sec_filings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the company's stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_texts" (
  "business_text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business text entry */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the filing containing the business overview */,
  "text" TEXT /* Extracted text from the business overview section */,
  "business_segment" TEXT /* Specific business segment or division being described */,
  "description_type" TEXT /* Type of business description (e.g., overview, strategy, products) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_texts_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES sec_filings ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_texts" (
  "risk_text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk factors text entry */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the filing containing the risk factors */,
  "text" TEXT /* Extracted text from the risk factors section */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Category of risk being described */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Potential impact level of the risk (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_texts_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES sec_filings ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "business_text_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the business text entry containing the keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Extracted keyword from the business overview section */,
  "keyword_type" TEXT /* Type of keyword (e.g., product, technology, market) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_keywords_business_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_text_id") REFERENCES business_texts ("business_text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "risk_text_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the risk factors text entry containing the keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Extracted keyword from the risk factors section */,
  "keyword_type" TEXT /* Type of keyword (e.g., risk factor, mitigation strategy) */,
  "relevance_score" TEXT /* Score indicating the relevance of the keyword to the risk text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_keywords_risk_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_text_id") REFERENCES risk_texts ("risk_text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, investor, regulator) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the user is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* User's job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the filing */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the filing was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the user's action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES sec_filings ("filing_id")
)
